name: goal-with-codex-plugin
description: Claude Code の goal workflow に公式 Codex plugin を組み込む Claude Code plugin skill

scripts.verify: jq empty package.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json plugins/goal-with-codex/.claude-plugin/plugin.json schemas/*.json && bash -n install.sh && find plugins/goal-with-codex/scripts -name '*.sh' -exec bash -n {} \; && find plugins/goal-with-codex/bin -type f -exec bash -n {} \; && npm test
